title: Upon Rump.
content:
Rump is a turn-broach, yet he seldom can
    Steal a swoln sop out of a dripping-pan.
meaning:
Robert Herrick's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Upon Rump."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
